info.description: A single narrated video lesson within a Course Topic, matching TOPICS[].lessons[] in studio-vr's courseData.js.

duration.description: Human-readable duration shown in the UI, e.g. "4 min" (matches lesson.duration).

order.description: Position within the parent topic's lesson list.

content.description: Lesson body. Replaces lesson.paragraphs[] — studio-vr can render each top-level block as a paragraph.

model3d.description: Rotatable 3D gear scan for this lesson (moved here from Course Topic so each lesson can carry its own model).
